questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Effect: Atleast 20 school children were seriously injured while going for a school picnic during the weekend. Which of the following can be a probable cause of the above effect?

choices.a: The teacher accompanying the school children fell ill during the journey
choices.b: The bus in which the children were travelling met with an accident while taking turn on the main highway
choices.c: The driver of the bus in which the children were travelling did not report after the break at the halting place on their journey
choices.d: The school authority banned all school picnics for the next six months with immediate effect

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Cause: Government has recently decided to hike the procurement price of paddy for the rabi crops. Which of the following will be a possible effect of the above cause?

choices.a: The farmers may be encouraged to cultivate paddy for the rabi season
choices.b: The farmers may switch over to other cash crops in their paddy fields
choices.c: There was a drop in production of paddy during Kharif season
choices.d: Government may not increase the procurement price of paddy during the next Kharif season
choices.e: Government will buy paddy from the open market during the next few months

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Cause: A severe cyclonic storm swept away most part of the state during the last two days. Which of the following cannot be a possible effect of the above cause?

choices.a: Heavy rainfall was reported in most part of the state during the last two days
choices.b: Many people were rendered homeless as their houses were blown away
choices.c: The communication system of the state was severely affected and continues to be out of gear
choices.d: Government has ordered that all the offices and schools should be kept open

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Cause: It has been reported by some important news papers that current year monsoon can be lower than desired level as in so many part of the country it is not raining as it is required. Which of the following can be a possible effect of above mentioned situation?

choices.a: People from less rain affected area can be displaced towards urban area
choices.b: Government can help the farmers of these areas with money package
choices.c: Government can declare these areas as drought regions
choices.d: People can blame Government for this situation and they can protest for not getting sufficient water for agriculture

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Effect: It has been reported in recent years that so many seats remain vacant in the engineering colleges of the country, at the end of admission session. Which of the following can be possible cause for the effect mentioned above?

choices.a: Because of the bad state of economy in the recent years, there has been dearth of jobs for engineering graduates
choices.b: Students have always given a priority to 3 yr engineering course in stead of 4 yr
choices.c: Government has decided to give professional training to all qualified engineering graduates on Government expenditure
choices.d: The success rate of engineering graduates has always been very poor

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Cause: To make available banking services to all citizens Government has decided to give directions to banks for opening of new branches so that one branch of any bank must be available for villages having population 1000 or more or for group of villages having population less than 1000. Which of the following can be the possible effect of the cause mentioned above?

choices.a: All the banks will follow the directives of Government
choices.b: No bank will follow the directives of the Government
choices.d: Only public sector banks will follow the directives of the Government

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Effect: Most of the final year students of the management institution have opted specialisation in finance. Which of the following can be a possible cause of the effect mentioned above?

choices.a: Last year, students with other specialisation got better proposals for jobs than those specialised in HR
choices.b: Management institution gives specialisation in finance only to the final year students
choices.c: Last year, students with specialisation in finance got most of the beneficial proposals in comparison to those specialised in marketing or HR
choices.d: Management institution apart from already giving specialisation in marketing and HR, has aflate started specialisation in finance
